description_long: This object is a modern laptop with a slim, rectangular form factor and a matte black finish. The device features a large display screen with thin bezels, showing a graphical user interface with multiple application windows open. The keyboard is full-sized, with a standard QWERTY layout and a spacious touchpad below it. The chassis appears to be constructed primarily from plastic or metal, with a smooth and slightly reflective surface. The hinge mechanism is robust, allowing the screen to remain upright at a comfortable viewing angle. No visible brand logos, stickers, or external ports are apparent from the provided views.
description: A sleek, matte black laptop with a large display, full keyboard, and spacious touchpad, featuring a modern and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with visible application windows, full keyboard, and touchpad.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the thin profile, open screen, and keyboard depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the screen and the laptop's overall slimness.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the open screen, keyboard, and the laptop's thin edge.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and on, displaying multiple application windows.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with function row, no numeric keypad visible.
